prompt.content:
Help update the S&P Global DCF model for the following (i) S&P Mobility dis-synergies as a percentage of revenue are 200 bps higher per year from 2026 to 2029, (ii) RemainCo stranded costs as a % of revenue are 300 bps higher in 2026 and 100 bps higher from 2027 to 2029, (iii) S&P Mobility operating-related expenses (which FDS labels as cost of revenue), selling and general expenses, and depreciation and amortization as a % of revenue from 2026 onwards remain flat and the same as FDS's FY2025 percentages (assume that FDS's D&A is fully baked into FDS's cost of revenue).

Based on these changes, report the following outputs:
1) Pro Forma EV (Post Spin Off) - SOTP Separate Entities.
2) Shareholder Equity Value Creation - %.

Round all monetary units to the nearest million and percentages to two decimal places.

rubrics.name: States Pro Forma EV (Post Spin Off) - SOTP Separate Entities is $139,752M... (ver_51cf015e5695463a92f3e4ed91ced022)

messages.content: States Pro Forma EV (Post Spin Off) - SOTP Separate Entities is $139,752M (acceptable range $138,354 to $141,150).

rubrics.name: States Shareholder Equity Value Creation is 3.39% (acceptable range 3.36% to... (ver_103f2baad2f34621acdaa9f67d2180d4)

messages.content: States Shareholder Equity Value Creation is 3.39% (acceptable range 3.36% to 3.42%).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Pro Forma EV (Post Spin Off) - SOTP Separate Entities: $139,752M
Shareholder Equity Value Creation: 3.39%
